label: CUCoreUtils
title: CUCoreUtils
lead: Small helper APIs for timing, readiness checks, PlayerPrefs accessors, world/item helpers, alerts, reflection, console bridging, keys, audio, and compression.
bodyHtml:
CUCoreUtils surface map

This page documents the current public surface in Helpers/CUCoreUtils.cs. The repo does not currently split these into separate Util/*.cs files, so the sections below use those category names as an organization aid.

Where CUCoreLib exposes both PascalCase and camelCase names, both are listed below. The camelCase forms are compatibility aliases, not different behaviors.

General runtime helpers

MethodArgsDescription
StartCoroutineIEnumerator routineRuns a coroutine from CUCoreLib's hidden persistent runner.
StartCoroutineFunc<IEnumerator> routineFactoryBuilds the coroutine lazily, then runs it through the same shared runner.
DelayCallfloat delaySeconds, Action actionRuns an action after a realtime delay.
CallWhenFunc<bool> condition, Action action, float checkRepeatTimeSeconds = 0fPolls until the condition is true, then runs the action.
AwaitMainMenu / awaitMainMenufloat checkRepeatTimeSeconds = 0fCoroutine wait helper for the main menu becoming available.
AwaitWorldGeneration / awaitWorldGenerationfloat checkRepeatTimeSeconds = 0fCoroutine wait helper for the runtime world finishing generation.
IsMainMenuReadyNoneReturns whether the game is currently at a usable main-menu state.
IsWorldGenerationReadyNoneReturns whether the world exists and is no longer generating.

KeyUtils

Method / MemberArgsDescription
FriendlyKeybind.disableInInputFieldsboolDisables the bind while a text input is focused.
FriendlyKeybind.disableInMainMenuboolDisables the bind while the main menu is open.
FriendlyKeybind.disableInHealthPanelboolDisables the bind while the wound or health panel is open.
FriendlyKeybind.disableInInventoryboolDisables the bind while the inventory or crafting panel is open.
FriendlyKeybind.KeyCodeNoneResolves the active KeyCode after settings and block-state checks.
FriendlyKeybind.KeyNameNoneReturns the player-facing display name for the active key.
GetKeySpriteKeyCode key, string spritePrefix = "Key_"Looks up a matching key sprite from loaded resources.
GetFriendlyKeyNameKeyCode keyReturns a friendlier display label for a raw key.
GetFriendlyKeyNamestring friendlyKeybindNameReturns the display label for a CUCoreLib-managed friendly keybind.
GetFriendlyKeyBindstring friendlyKeybindNameReturns a bind handle that can be configured and queried later.
AllowKeybindRebindstring friendlyKeybindName, string descriptionToShowInSettingsKeybindMenuRegisters the bind in the in-game keybind settings menu.
SetFriendlyKeyNameKeyCode key, string displayNameOverrides the displayed label for a key.

PlayerPrefsUtils

MethodArgsDescription
GetBool / getBoolstring key, bool defaultValue = falseReads a boolean value from PlayerPrefs.
SetBool / setBoolstring key, bool valueStores a boolean value in PlayerPrefs.
GetFloat / getFloatstring key, float defaultValue = 0fReads a float value from PlayerPrefs.
SetFloat / setFloatstring key, float valueStores a float value in PlayerPrefs.
GetString / getStringstring key, string defaultValue = ""Reads a string value from PlayerPrefs.
SetString / setStringstring key, string valueStores a string value in PlayerPrefs.

PlayerUtils

MethodArgsDescription
IsInWorld / isInWorldNoneReturns whether a usable runtime world and player body are available.
TryGetBody / tryGetBodyout Body bodyAttempts to get the active player body.
TryGetCamera / tryGetCameraout PlayerCamera cameraAttempts to get the active player camera.
GetMousePosition / getMousePositionNoneReturns the current mouse or target-look position, depending on player state.
ShowAlert / showAlertstring text, bool? important = falseShows an on-screen alert immediately.
Alert / alertstring text, bool important, float delay = 0fShows an on-screen alert immediately or after a delay.
Talk / talkstring dialogueRoutes dialogue through the player body's talker.
TalkElectronic / talkElectronicstring dialogue, Item item = nullRoutes dialogue through an item's talker or a watch-style fallback proxy.
PlaySoundAt / playSoundAtAudioClip clip, Vector2? pos = nullPlays a clip at a position or at the player by default.
PlaySoundAt / playSoundAtAudioClip clip, float? volume = null, float? delay = null, Vector2? position = null, float? pitch = nullPlays a clip with optional volume, delay, position, and pitch overrides.

PlayerInventoryUtils

MethodArgsDescription
TryGetHeldItem / tryGetHeldItemout Item itemAttempts to get the item currently held by the player.
TryGetHoveredItem / tryGetHoveredItemout Item itemAttempts to find the item currently under the mouse, either in UI or in the world.
GiveItem / giveItemstring id, int countSpawns item instances near the player and auto-picks them up.
GiveItemSlot / giveItemSlotstring id, int slot, int countSpawns item instances near the player and tries to put them into a specific slot.
TryGetCustomItemInfo / tryGetCustomItemInfostring id, out CustomItemInfo infoLooks up registered custom item metadata by ID.
IsModdedItem / isModdedItemstring itemIdReturns whether an item ID belongs to a recognized modded item path.

PlayerLimbUtils

MethodArgsDescription
DoAmputate / doAmputateItem item, Limb limbForwards into the vanilla amputation interaction instead of requiring copied limb-use logic.

ReflectionUtils

MethodArgsDescription
GetMethodobject target, string methodNameReturns a reflected method from the target object or type.
InvokeMethodobject target, string methodName, params object[] argsLooks up a method and invokes it with the supplied arguments.

MathExtensions

MethodArgsDescription
IsFinitethis float valueReturns whether a float is neither NaN nor infinity.
IsFinitethis Vector2 valueReturns whether both vector components are finite.

Console and misc helpers

MethodArgsDescription
ConsoleLogConsoleScript instance, string messageWrites a message into the in-game console through the game's internal logging path.
ConsoleRunCommandConsoleScript instance, string commandStringExecutes a command string through the in-game console.
ConsoleCheckForWorldConsoleScript instanceRuns the game's console-side world check before world-dependent commands.
LoadEmbeddedSpritestring resourcePath, float pixelsPerUnit = AssetLoader.PPU_UI, Assembly sourceAssembly = nullPass-through helper for loading an embedded sprite.
CompressGZipbyte[] dataCompresses a byte array with GZip.
DecompressGZipbyte[] compressedDataDecompresses a GZip byte array.
CompressDeflatebyte[] dataCompresses a byte array with Deflate.
DecompressDeflatebyte[] compressedDataDecompresses a Deflate byte array.

Currently empty categories

For the current worktree, there are no dedicated public CUCoreUtils members that map cleanly to the category names LocaleUtils, PlayerSkillUtils, or TextUtils.
bodyText: CUCoreUtils surface map This page documents the current public surface in Helpers/CUCoreUtils.cs . The repo does not currently split these into separate Util/*.cs files, so the sections below use those category names as an organization aid. Where CUCoreLib exposes both PascalCase and camelCase names, both are listed below. The camelCase forms are compatibility aliases, not different behaviors. General runtime helpers Method Args Description StartCoroutine IEnumerator routine Runs a coroutine from CUCoreLib's hidden persistent runner. StartCoroutine Func<IEnumerator> routineFactory Builds the coroutine lazily, then runs it through the same shared runner. DelayCall float delaySeconds, Action action Runs an action after a realtime delay. CallWhen Func<bool> condition, Action action, float checkRepeatTimeSeconds = 0f Polls until the condition is true, then runs the action. AwaitMainMenu / awaitMainMenu float checkRepeatTimeSeconds = 0f Coroutine wait helper for the main menu becoming available. AwaitWorldGeneration / awaitWorldGeneration float checkRepeatTimeSeconds = 0f Coroutine wait helper for the runtime world finishing generation. IsMainMenuReady None Returns whether the game is currently at a usable main-menu state. IsWorldGenerationReady None Returns whether the world exists and is no longer generating. KeyUtils Method / Member Args Description FriendlyKeybind.disableInInputFields bool Disables the bind while a text input is focused. FriendlyKeybind.disableInMainMenu bool Disables the bind while the main menu is open. FriendlyKeybind.disableInHealthPanel bool Disables the bind while the wound or health panel is open. FriendlyKeybind.disableInInventory bool Disables the bind while the inventory or crafting panel is open. FriendlyKeybind.KeyCode None Resolves the active KeyCode after settings and block-state checks. FriendlyKeybind.KeyName None Returns the player-facing display name for the active key. GetKeySprite KeyCode key, string spritePrefix = "Key_" Looks up a matching key sprite from loaded resources. GetFriendlyKeyName KeyCode key Returns a friendlier display label for a raw key. GetFriendlyKeyName string friendlyKeybindName Returns the display label for a CUCoreLib-managed friendly keybind. GetFriendlyKeyBind string friendlyKeybindName Returns a bind handle that can be configured and queried later. AllowKeybindRebind string friendlyKeybindName, string descriptionToShowInSettingsKeybindMenu Registers the bind in the in-game keybind settings menu. SetFriendlyKeyName KeyCode key, string displayName Overrides the displayed label for a key. PlayerPrefsUtils Method Args Description GetBool / getBool string key, bool defaultValue = false Reads a boolean value from PlayerPrefs . SetBool / setBool string key, bool value Stores a boolean value in PlayerPrefs . GetFloat / getFloat string key, float defaultValue = 0f Reads a float value from PlayerPrefs . SetFloat / setFloat string key, float value Stores a float value in PlayerPrefs . GetString / getString string key, string defaultValue = "" Reads a string value from PlayerPrefs . SetString / setString string key, string value Stores a string value in PlayerPrefs . PlayerUtils Method Args Description IsInWorld / isInWorld None Returns whether a usable runtime world and player body are available. TryGetBody / tryGetBody out Body body Attempts to get the active player body. TryGetCamera / tryGetCamera out PlayerCamera camera Attempts to get the active player camera. GetMousePosition / getMousePosition None Returns the current mouse or target-look position, depending on player state. ShowAlert / showAlert string text, bool? important = false Shows an on-screen alert immediately. Alert / alert string text, bool important, float delay = 0f Shows an on-screen alert immediately or after a delay. Talk / talk string dialogue Routes dialogue through the player body's talker. TalkElectronic / talkElectronic string dialogue, Item item = null Routes dialogue through an item's talker or a watch-style fallback proxy. PlaySoundAt / playSoundAt AudioClip clip, Vector2? pos = null Plays a clip at a position or at the player by default. PlaySoundAt / playSoundAt AudioClip clip, float? volume = null, float? delay = null, Vector2? position = null, float? pitch = null Plays a clip with optional volume, delay, position, and pitch overrides. PlayerInventoryUtils Method Args Description TryGetHeldItem / tryGetHeldItem out Item item Attempts to get the item currently held by the player. TryGetHoveredItem / tryGetHoveredItem out Item item Attempts to find the item currently under the mouse, either in UI or in the world. GiveItem / giveItem string id, int count Spawns item instances near the player and auto-picks them up. GiveItemSlot / giveItemSlot string id, int slot, int count Spawns item instances near the player and tries to put them into a specific slot. TryGetCustomItemInfo / tryGetCustomItemInfo string id, out CustomItemInfo info Looks up registered custom item metadata by ID. IsModdedItem / isModdedItem string itemId Returns whether an item ID belongs to a recognized modded item path. PlayerLimbUtils Method Args Description DoAmputate / doAmputate Item item, Limb limb Forwards into the vanilla amputation interaction instead of requiring copied limb-use logic. ReflectionUtils Method Args Description GetMethod object target, string methodName Returns a reflected method from the target object or type. InvokeMethod object target, string methodName, params object[] args Looks up a method and invokes it with the supplied arguments. MathExtensions Method Args Description IsFinite this float value Returns whether a float is neither NaN nor infinity. IsFinite this Vector2 value Returns whether both vector components are finite. Console and misc helpers Method Args Description ConsoleLog ConsoleScript instance, string message Writes a message into the in-game console through the game's internal logging path. ConsoleRunCommand ConsoleScript instance, string commandString Executes a command string through the in-game console. ConsoleCheckForWorld ConsoleScript instance Runs the game's console-side world check before world-dependent commands. LoadEmbeddedSprite string resourcePath, float pixelsPerUnit = AssetLoader.PPU_UI, Assembly sourceAssembly = null Pass-through helper for loading an embedded sprite. CompressGZip byte[] data Compresses a byte array with GZip. DecompressGZip byte[] compressedData Decompresses a GZip byte array. CompressDeflate byte[] data Compresses a byte array with Deflate. DecompressDeflate byte[] compressedData Decompresses a Deflate byte array.
